function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - entity.claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-18 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed successfully; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, YAML subject quoted correctly. Next finalize inbox cleanup.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit report_completion with full grounding refs
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.
